item.title: Sensex Dips Over 800 Points as Utilities Lead Gains Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: Indian equity markets witnessed a sharp correction on 12 Mar 2026, with the Sensex closing 831.93 points lower at 76,031.78, marking a 1.08% decline. The Nifty followed suit, dragged down by weak sectoral performances and subdued investor sentiment, while utilities emerged as the lone bright spot in an otherwise broad-based selloff. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Downward Pressure Amid Mixed Stock Movements
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a notable downturn over recent sessions, with a five-day decline of 3.15% culminating in a day-on-day drop of 0.87% on 12 Mar 2026. This performance reflects a broader market hesitation amid mixed sectoral trends, where defensive stocks have shown relative resilience compared to their cyclical counterparts. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Sees Mild Correction Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends
item.description: The BSE Midcap 150 index experienced a modest decline of 0.28% on 12 Mar 2026, reflecting a cautious market mood amid mixed sectoral performances. Over the past five trading sessions, the mid-cap segment has contracted by 1.76%, signalling some profit-taking and selective stock rotations within this vital market segment. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Sees Mild Correction Amid Mixed Sectoral Trends
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has experienced a modest decline of 0.29% today, extending a recent downtrend with a 1.08% fall over the past five trading sessions. Despite this overall softness, the segment continues to display pockets of strength and technical upgrades, reflecting a nuanced market environment for investors focused on smaller capitalisation stocks. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: The Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd. Hits New 52-Week High at Rs.128.45
item.description: The Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd. has reached a significant milestone by hitting a new 52-week high of Rs.128.45, marking a notable surge amid a challenging market environment. This achievement underscores the stock’s strong momentum and resilience in the private sector banking space. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: Banganga Paper Industries Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.32.11
item.description: Banganga Paper Industries Ltd touched a new 52-week low of Rs.32.11 today, marking a significant decline in its stock price amid ongoing challenges reflected in its financial and market performance. The stock’s fall comes as the broader market also experiences downward pressure, with the Sensex trading lower and several indices hitting fresh lows. Time: 12 minutes ago

item.title: N K Industries Ltd Stock Hits 52-Week Low Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: N K Industries Ltd, a micro-cap player in the edible oil sector, touched a fresh 52-week low of Rs.51.28 today, marking a significant decline amid a broadly bearish market environment. The stock’s performance has been notably weak, underperforming its sector and broader indices over recent sessions. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: TRF Ltd Stock Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.221.95 Amidst Continued Downtrend
item.description: TRF Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Industrial Manufacturing sector, touched a new 52-week low of Rs.221.95 today, marking a significant milestone in its ongoing price decline. Despite a modest gain of 1.86% on the day and a three-day consecutive rise totalling 3.89%, the stock remains under pressure, reflecting broader challenges faced by the company and the sector. Time: 13 minutes ago

item.title: Siddha Ventures Ltd Stock Hits 52-Week Low at Rs.3.27 Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Siddha Ventures Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, touched a fresh 52-week low of Rs.3.27 today, marking a significant decline amid a broader market downturn and persistent underperformance relative to its sector and benchmark indices. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Enkei Wheels India Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Continued Market Pressure
item.description: Enkei Wheels India Ltd has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.400.25 today, marking a significant decline amid a broader market downturn and persistent underperformance relative to its sector and benchmark indices. Time: 14 minutes ago

item.title: Bannari Amman Spinning Mills Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amidst Market Downturn
item.description: Bannari Amman Spinning Mills Ltd has declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.19.8, marking a significant downturn in its share price amid broader market pressures and company-specific performance factors. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: Rajkamal Synthetics Ltd Hits 52-Week Low Amidst Market Downturn
item.description: Rajkamal Synthetics Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Garments & Apparels sector, touched a new 52-week low of Rs.31.1 today, reflecting ongoing pressures amid a broadly bearish market environment and sector-specific dynamics. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: SMT Engineering Ltd Hits New 52-Week High at Rs.485.2
item.description: SMT Engineering Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Trading & Distributors sector, reached a significant milestone today by hitting a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs.485.2. This achievement marks a continuation of the stock’s strong upward momentum, reflecting sustained gains over the past several sessions despite broader market weakness. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: Coral India Finance & Housing Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.31.52
item.description: Shares of Coral India Finance & Housing Ltd have declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.31.52, reflecting ongoing pressures on the stock amid broader market weakness and company-specific performance concerns. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Amba Enterprises Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.117.15 Amid Market Downturn
item.description: Amba Enterprises Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Other Electrical Equipment sector, has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.117.15 on 12 Mar 2026, marking a significant decline amid broader market weakness and sectoral pressures. The stock has underperformed both its sector and the broader market indices over the past year, reflecting a challenging environment for the company. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: MSR India Ltd Hits New 52-Week High of Rs.7.38 on 12 Mar 2026
item.description: MSR India Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Industrial Products sector, has surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs.7.38, marking a significant milestone in its recent market performance. This new peak reflects a robust rally that has seen the stock outperform its sector and broader market indices amid a challenging environment for the Sensex. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Kunststoffe Industries Ltd Stock Hits 52-Week Low at Rs.18.15
item.description: Kunststoffe Industries Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Plastic Products - Industrial sector, has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.18.15 today, marking a significant decline amid a broader market downturn. The stock has underperformed its sector and key indices, reflecting ongoing pressures on its valuation and performance metrics. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Sterling Powergensys Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.19.5 Amid Weak Financials
item.description: Sterling Powergensys Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Industrial Manufacturing sector, touched a new 52-week low of Rs.19.5 today, marking a significant decline amid a broader market downturn. The stock underperformed its sector by 1.02% and reversed gains made over the previous two days, continuing a challenging trend for the company. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Parle Industries Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs.5.5 Amid Market Downturn
item.description: Parle Industries Ltd has touched a new 52-week low of Rs.5.5 today, marking a significant decline in its share price amid broader market weakness and sector underperformance. The stock’s fall comes after two days of gains, reversing recent momentum and underperforming its sector by 7.7% on the day. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Magnus Steel & Infra Ltd Hits New 52-Week High at Rs.72.52
item.description: Magnus Steel & Infra Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Other Electrical Equipment sector, reached a significant milestone on 12 Mar 2026 by hitting a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs.72.52. This achievement marks a continuation of strong momentum, with the stock registering a 51.27% gain over the past 21 trading sessions, outperforming its sector and demonstrating robust technical strength amid a broader market downturn. Time: 17 minutes ago
